etymology.text:
سَلُوق (salūq) + ـِيّ (-iyy), a village in Yemen, according to Arabic tradition, however there are homonymic settlement names to consider, including three named سَلُوقِيَّة (salūqiyya), Seleucia on the Tigris, Seleucia in Pieria, Seleucia on the Calycadnus.

سِلُوقُس (silūqus, “Seleucus”) + ـِيّ (-iyy)
